firms.name: Dapth
firms.service_positioning: Expert-led digital consultancy with transformation advisory focus
firms.assessment_notes: Good medium-fit for digital transformation advisory market. Expert-led delivery model creates owner-dependency and scaling constraints that align with Adapt ICP.
firms.outreach_angle: Reduce expert/owner dependency; build repeatable processes

firms.name: TD Strategy & Consulting

confidence_breakdown.note: Positioning highly favorable; assessment in progress

firms.buyer_fit_assessment: STRONG - Advisory-first positioning suggests good fit
firms.assessment_notes: Requires detailed service-fit assessment before outreach. Strategy/consulting nomenclature suggests advisory model rather than implementation-led engagement.

firms.name: Origin Digital

confidence_breakdown.note: Good score; positioning clarity verification needed

firms.service_positioning: Digital transformation advisory - positioning clarity required
firms.buyer_fit_assessment: MODERATE - Mid-range confidence; verify advisory vs. implementation focus
firms.assessment_notes: Requires detailed service-fit assessment and positioning clarity. Risk flag: Ensure 'transformation advisory' positioning vs. 'implementation/development shop' before outreach.

firms.name: Zetta
firms.verification_gap: Not found in system - may be alternative name, new firm, or ASIC lookup needed

firms.name: Setonix Digital
firms.verification_gap: Not found in system - verify advisory vs. web dev/implementation positioning
firms.msp_risk: LOW-MEDIUM - Name does not obviously suggest MSP, but requires validation

firms.name: TI Systems
firms.verification_gap: Not found in system - critical positioning clarification needed
firms.msp_risk: HIGH - 'Systems' nomenclature suggests IT support/MSP model
critical_questions: Is this an IT managed services provider or strategy/transformation consultant?
Do they offer advisory/transformation services or primarily infrastructure/support?
What percentage of revenue is advisory vs. implementation/ongoing support?
search_methods: ASIC ABN search for 'TI Systems Perth'
Google search: 'TI Systems Perth transformation' vs 'TI Systems Perth managed services'

firms.name: Royal IT
firms.verification_gap: Not found in system - critical positioning clarification needed
firms.msp_risk: MEDIUM - 'IT' nomenclature suggests IT support/infrastructure focus
critical_questions: Are they IT infrastructure/support provider or digital transformation advisor?
Leadership structure and team expertise (IT operations vs. business strategy)?
search_methods: ASIC ABN search for 'Royal IT Perth'
Google search clarification: advisory vs. support model

firms.name: Managed Digital
firms.verification_gap: Not found in system - verify digital transformation focus vs. implementation

medium_priority_candidates.note: Lower confidence scores suggest positioning less clear or less ideal fit than top tier

firms.name: PC Computing
firms.msp_risk: HIGH LIKELIHOOD - 'Computing' name + low score suggests MSP/tech support model
firms.recommendation: Defer for now; verify MSP vs. advisory positioning if pursued

firms.name: Beyond Technology
firms.msp_risk: UNCERTAIN - Name neutral; low score suggests non-advisory positioning
firms.recommendation: Defer for now; research positioning clarity

firms.name: Perth Business Advisors
firms.recommendation: Exclude from outreach - competitive service overlap, micro-scale

firms.name: Bureau42
firms.recommendation: Exclude from outreach - marketing agency, not transformation advisory; consider partnership/referral instead
